pull.title: PAY-248 Add idempotency checks to refund webhook
pull.body:
## Summary
Prevent duplicate refund processing when Stripe retries webhook delivery.

## Jira
PAY-248

files.patch:
@@
+def process_refund(event, seen_ids=[]):
+    try:
+        refund_id = event['id']
+        print(f'refund webhook {refund_id}')
+    except Exception:
+        return None

@@
+TODO: tighten retry handling before merge
+if payload.get('token'):
+    logger.info('token present')

@@
+ALTER TABLE refunds ADD COLUMN idempotency_key TEXT;

commit.message: PAY-248 add refund idempotency key migration
PAY-248 reject duplicate refund events before side effects

issue_comments.body: Please verify this still matches PAY-248 acceptance criteria and duplicate Stripe retries.

review_comments.body: What happens if the webhook acknowledgement fails after the idempotency key is written?

fields.summary: Prevent duplicate refund processing during Stripe webhook retries

content.text: Create idempotent handling for refund webhooks to avoid duplicate payout adjustments and repeat side effects.

comments.body: Please confirm duplicate Stripe deliveries do not create multiple refund records.
Support also needs enough context to trace retries in logs.
